headline: NEVER STOP BATCH RELEASE
subheading: How a pre-qualified interim QP bridges absence and keeps your MIA compliant.
flux_prompt: Editorial conceptual illustration of continuity and a seamless handover in pharmaceutical quality control. A glowing teal-and-cyan bridge of light arcs across a gap between two precision platforms set against a deep navy background, symbolising an interim Qualified Person closing a break in the batch-release chain. Beneath the bridge, an unbroken chain of softly lit links flows left to right, one link rendered in fresh-green to mark the moment cover steps in. Abstract frosted-glass cleanroom panels, faint molecular helix motifs and floating certification document silhouettes drift in soft bokeh, suggesting GMP rigour and uninterrupted certification. Clinical-luxury mood, polished surfaces, subtle volumetric light, refined depth of field, deep navy base with teal and cyan accents and a single fresh-green highlight. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
